    list() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.CustomerApi
    Returns all customers visible to admin customer management screens.
    list() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.RewardTierApi
    Returns reward tier rows used by loyalty administration screens.
    listAll() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.BakeryApi
    Returns all bakeries mapped into desktop Bakery models.
    listAll() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.RewardApi
    Returns reward ledger rows with optional order and customer display enrichment.

    listStaff() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.EmployeeApi
    Returns staff rows used by employee management tables.
    listUsers() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.UserManagementApi
    Returns all admin-manageable users from the users endpoint.

    loadUnlinkedCustomerRoleUsersForNewCustomer() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.ReferenceApi
    Customer-role logins that are not linked to any profile yet.
    loadUnlinkedStaffUsersForNewEmployee() - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.api.ReferenceApi
    Admin or employee logins that still need a new employee profile row.
    Log - Class in com.sait.workshop05.models
     
    Log(String, String) - Constructor for class com.sait.workshop05.models.Log
    Creates one audit log line payload.
    logAction(String, String) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.logging.LogData
    Writes a structured action line for the current user.
    LogData - Class in com.sait.workshop05.logging
    File-backed audit lines plus Sentry forwarding for staff action and error paths.
    LogData() - Constructor for class com.sait.workshop05.logging.LogData
     
    logError(Log) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.logging.LogData
    Appends an error line to Log.txt and falls back to stderr on write failure.
